title: Sticherus amoenus
taxonomy: Sticherus amoenus is classified within the family of plants known as Gleicheniaceae. This family is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The Gleicheniaceae family is further divided into the genus Sticherus, with S. amoenus being one of its species. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other ferns.
